case_title: INNOVATIVE WINDOWS, INC VS. TALMADGE & TALMADGE, INC.

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF INNOVATIVE WINDOWS, INC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-26-2011 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF INNOVATIVE WINDOWS, INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TALMADGE & TALMADGE, INC. DBA WORLD GYM $1,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,270.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
